video.title: Giro d'Italia 2020 - Stage 9 Highlights | Cycling | Eurosport

transcript.clean_text: the final stage of the opening block of racing at the chilo d'italia would take place on the roads of abruzzo taking in the pasolan channel and three other categorized climbs and ending with a climb to roccarazzo 208 kilometers but four and a half thousand meters of climbing a hugely important day in prospect seven men went up the road and would go for the first categorized climb at the top of the pasolan channel visconti taking the maximum points in the blue jersey competition all the while behind mikhail biowa had set off for the peloton chasing he closed the gap and make the break eight with the weather not doing too well behind and making it very difficult for both break away and those chasing on in the break with 35 kilometers to go mikhail biel after coming across was the first to attack castro the first to follow and in the meantime in the pink jersey group vincenzo niwali was preparing a shark attack not enough damage being done though when he looked behind and he told his team to knock off the effort five remainder v8 in the breakaway at this point with two categorized climbs remaining the gap looked good enough to go on and contest the stage win honor the final climb they went behind in the peliton it was all a little bit nervy and tailgate alongside lucas hamilton trying to take time back and for the stage win once castro viejo attacked gerhart would be the only man to follow castroviejo the spaniard the portuguese hoping to become the first portuguese rider in 31 years to win a stage lucas hamilton the australian and the brits kagan heart gaining time and with castro viejo failing to ride the portuguese off his wheel it would be the former national champion who would take his first ever big win in the pro peliton a maiden grand tour stage win for ruben had a second stage win of the race for ef education first and behind there were differences in the gc the pink jersey losing a little bit of time but it would be double portuguese joy as joao almeida held on to the race lead he'd break a new portuguese record in the process he's now the man who's led grand tours for the most days seven for his home nation portugal so changes in the gc a few seconds here and there nothing seismic but certainly a seismic result on the fault lines of italy for huben gerheigh the biggest win of his career so far and the 26 year old doing it all again for ef full sang the biggest winner in the gc fight nearly losing a few seconds to him the joao al-maida still in pink now with a 30-second lead pale bill valve moved down to third but get closer to the race lead wilco calderman and jakob paul sang the big winners on the day nibali still in the top five but now at less than a minute from the maya rosa after the rest day a difficult stage in prospect stage 10 hitting the adriatic once more beginning in abruzzo but going up the coast and after a lap around it will finish at tortore toledo 177 kilometers as the gerald italia resumes following the first rest day you
